description: Composition Blue printed dress made of 100% cotton, has a cross over V-neck with net detailing, a smocking style elasticated back, a satin belt and flaring pin-tucks at the midriff Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycle Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Medium heat steam iron do not iron on decorations Do not dry in sunlight Comfy enough for everyday play but cute enough to wear to her best friend's birthday party, choose this frock from doodle if you're looking for a versatile dress which girls will love.
